mapper.insert: insert into tbl_post (member_id, title, content, location, reply_post_id, community_id) values (#{memberId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{location}, #{replyPostId}, #{communityId})
mapper.update: update tbl_post set title = #{postTitle}, content = #{postContent}, location = #{location}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_post set post_status = 'inactive', updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_post set post_read_count = post_read_count + 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select p.id, p.member_id, p.post_status, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, p.location, p.reply_post_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, m.member_name as member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = p.id) as like_count, (select count(*) from tbl_post rp where rp.reply_post_id = p.id and rp.post_status = 'active') as reply_count, p.post_read_count, bg.badge_type, p.community_id, c.community_name, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = p.id and pl2.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_liked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = p.id and b.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_bookmarked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_follow f where f.follower_id = #{memberId} and f.following_id = p.member_id ) then true else false end as is_followed from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id left join tbl_badge bg on bg.member_id = p.member_id left join tbl_community c on p.community_id = c.id where p.id = #{id} and p.post_status = 'active'

select v.*, n.news_title, n.news_content as news_content, n.news_type, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = v.id and pl2.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_liked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = v.id and b.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_bookmarked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_follow f where f.follower_id = #{memberId} and f.following_id = v.member_id ) then true else false end as is_followed from view_post_feed v left join tbl_news n on n.post_id = v.id and n.news_type = 'emergency' where v.member_id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{memberId}) and v.member_id not in (select bl.blocker_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocked_id = #{memberId}) and v.member_id not in (select r.target_id from tbl_report r where r.reporter_id = #{memberId} and r.target_type = 'member') and v.id not in (select r.target_id from tbl_report r where r.reporter_id = #{memberId} and r.target_type = 'post') and not exists (select 1 from tbl_news gn where gn.post_id = v.id and gn.news_type = 'general') order by v.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select v.*, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = v.id and pl2.member_id = #{postSearch.memberId} ) then true else false end as is_liked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = v.id and b.member_id = #{postSearch.memberId} ) then true else false end as is_bookmarked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_follow f where f.follower_id = #{postSearch.memberId} and f.following_id = v.member_id ) then true else false end as is_followed from view_post_feed v where v.member_id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{postSearch.memberId}) and v.member_id not in (select bl.blocker_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocked_id = #{postSearch.memberId}) and v.member_id not in (select r.target_id from tbl_report r where r.reporter_id = #{postSearch.memberId} and r.target_type = 'member') and v.id not in (select r.target_id from tbl_report r where r.reporter_id = #{postSearch.memberId} and r.target_type = 'post')
and (v.post_title like concat('%', #{postSearch.keyword}, '%') or v.post_content like concat('%', #{postSearch.keyword}, '%'))
order by v.like_count desc
order by v.created_datetime desc
limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_post p where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_product pp where pp.id = p.id )

select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl join tbl_post p on pl.post_id = p.id where pl.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_product pp where pp.id = p.id )
select count(*) from tbl_post p where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is not null
select count(*) from tbl_post where post_status = 'active' and reply_post_id is null

select count(*) from tbl_post where post_status = 'active' and reply_post_id is null
and (title like concat('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{search.keyword}, '%'))
mapper.sql: p.id, p.member_id, p.post_status, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, p.location, p.reply_post_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, m.member_name as member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = p.id) as like_count, (select count(*) from tbl_post rp where rp.reply_post_id = p.id and rp.post_status = 'active') as reply_count, (select count(*) from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = p.id) as bookmark_count, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = p.id and pl2.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_liked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = p.id and b.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_bookmarked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_report r where r.target_id = p.id and r.reporter_id = #{memberId} and r.target_type = 'post' ) then true else false end as is_reported
mapper.select: select from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where p.reply_post_id = #{postId} and p.post_status = 'active' and p.member_id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{memberId}) and p.member_id not in (select bl.blocker_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocked_id = #{memberId}) order by p.created_datetime asc
